system.description:
Druids are independent priests who ally themselves with various spirits of the land. Virtually every feature of the land on Athas has a druid to protect it. They regard the ways of the natural world as the ideal state of things.

Holy Symbol: A druid must carry a holy symbol

Spell Casting: A druid may pray to receive spells from the sphere of the cosmos and the sphere of nature

Guarded Lands: Every druid must choose one type of geographic feature to be his guarded lands, gaining various powers depending on level

Concealment in Guarded Lands: At 1st Level, remain concealed from others while in guarded lands (proof against non-magical detection)

Animal and Plant Identification: At 3rd Level, identify animals and plants from guarded lands. At 8th Level, identify all plants and animals and discern pure water

Animal Communication: At 7th Level, speak with all animals in guarded lands. At 9th Level, speak with plants

Self-Sustenance: At 10th Level, live without water or nourishment in guarded lands, drawing life energy directly from the land

Animal Form: At 7th level, change into the form of an animal from favored land three times per day, regaining 1d4 hit points per level

Permanent Settlement: Upon reaching 12th level, must spend half of his time on guarded lands. May build a shrine and take 1d6 low level druids as disciples

class.armor: No metal armor or shields (wooden shields allowed)
class.weapons: Clubs, daggers, slings, spears, and staves
